Hero.tagline: Bags with a story. Your style with a fresh breath.
Hero.subtitle: Second life of clothes — first love for bags.

About.subtitle: We create bags that have their own story. Each piece is a combination of care, aesthetics and respect for materials that have already lived.
About.workshopText: We believe in the beauty of simple things and the power of a second chance. Our products are not just accessories, but stylish and practical items created with care for people and the planet. Each bag has its own story — and becomes part of yours.
About.materialsTitle: Materials we give a second life
About.materialsText: We sew from what someone once chose: old jeans, jackets, fabrics from second-hand shops. We carefully select materials to give them a new life — in the form of unique bags with character. This is the aesthetics of conscious consumption, where every item matters.
About.quote: We don't just sew bags. We create things that remind us — a second chance can be beautiful.

Blog.post1Title: How our unique bags are born ♻️
Blog.post1Excerpt: We tell how old clothes get a second life — from fabric selection to creating stylish handmade bags.
Blog.post1Content:
We tell how old clothes get a second life — from fabric selection to creating stylish handmade bags.

It all starts with finding high-quality materials that have already been used. Then we carefully select colors, textures and details to create something truly special.

Each bag has its own story, and we are happy to share it with you 💛
Blog.post2Title: 5 reasons to choose a bag made from recycled clothing 🌿
Blog.post2Excerpt: Eco-friendliness, uniqueness, style and care for the planet — that's why we love upcycling.
Blog.post2Content:
Eco-friendliness, uniqueness, style and care for the planet — that's why we love upcycling.

Each product is handmade, without harmful waste and excess production. You get not just a thing — but a piece of conscious fashion 🌱
Blog.post3Title: How we create the design of each model 🎨
Blog.post3Excerpt: Take a look behind the scenes of our workshop — how ideas are born, materials are selected and colors are combined.
Blog.post3Content:
It all starts with an idea. We create sketches, experiment with shapes and colors.

Then we select materials that already have a history and breathe new life into them. Each model is the result of inspiration, work and love for details 💫

Delivery.deliveryItem2Text: we will arrange a convenient time and place of delivery.
Delivery.paymentItem3Text: after placing your order we will send bank details.

Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data when using our online bag store in Poland.
Privacy.s1Text: The administrator of your personal data is [Company Name] based in [Address in Poland]. You can contact us at the e-mail address: [email].
s2Items: Payment data (not stored on our site, processed by the PayU payment system)
s3Items: Issuing invoices and accounting for payments
Privacy.s4Text: We store your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or in accordance with the requirements of Polish and EU law.
s5Items: Restrict processing or object to it
File a complaint with the data protection authority (UODO in Poland)
Privacy.s6Text: Our website uses cookies to improve performance and analyze traffic. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

Privacy.s7Intro: We do not share your data with third-party companies, except:

Checkout.emptyCartSub: Add a product to place an order

Checkout.bankDesc: Transfer to our account. Details will be sent after placing the order.
Checkout.cashDesc: Pay cash to the courier or at the post office upon receiving the order.

PhotoCard.title: About us
PhotoCard.heading: Bags made with soul
PhotoCard.text: In our store we give your clothes a second life! We transform old, unused garments into stylish bags that combine fashion with ecology. Each bag has its own story and character, and you can have a unique accessory made with passion. Your style, our creativity — together we create something one of a kind!

MainCategory.title: Shop by category
MainCategory.toteDesc: Your reliable companion in the big city. Spacious and stylish.
MainCategory.shopperDesc: For walks, shopping and adventures. Light, with character.
MainCategory.miniDesc: Small, but with big personality. They add a spark to your look.
